name: Registry Modifications
description: Detects registry key/value creation, modification, deletion, and permission changes. Security log events require 'Audit Registry' policy and SACLs on registry keys. Sysmon Events 12/13/14 are far easier to deploy — no SACL configuration required.
author: EventHawk (SANS/Microsoft/Sigma)

event_descriptions.4657: Registry value modified — ObjectName (key path), OldValueName, OldValue, NewValue, ProcessName
event_descriptions.4659: Handle to registry key requested with intent to delete
event_descriptions.12: Sysmon: RegistryEvent — key/value Created or Deleted — TargetObject (full key path), Image
event_descriptions.13: Sysmon: RegistryEvent — value Set — TargetObject, Details (new value data), Image
event_descriptions.14: Sysmon: RegistryEvent — key/value Renamed — TargetObject, NewName, Image
